[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / translateY

# Method: translateY()

## Call Signature

```ts
translateY(): number;
```

Current accumulated Y-axis translation.

### Returns

`number`

Current Y-axis translation in grid cells.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="translateY" encoded-code="" />

## Call Signature

```ts
translateY(pixels): void;
```

Translate subsequent shapes along the Y axis.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `pixels` | `number` | Translation offset in grid cells. |

### Returns

`void`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="translateY" encoded-code="-IHsKCXQucmVzaXplQ2FudmFzKHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lcldpZHRoLCB3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJIZWlnaHQpOwp9KTs" />
